steps.title: Identify the timeline contrast
steps.content: The passage states that Centro de Arte de las Americas was founded in 1991 and Plaza de Cultura y Artes del Suroeste opened in 2011. That timeline contrast is directly reflected in one of the answer choices.

steps.title: Match the timeline to the answer choices
steps.content: Plaza de Cultura y Artes del Suroeste opened more recently than Centro de Arte de las Americas based on the dates provided in the passage. The other choices all reference information not mentioned in the text. D is correct.
